name: SCC_SetOptionalParameterUnsigned
title: SCC_SetOptionalParameterUnsigned
syntax: long SCC_SetOptionalParameterUnsigned ( dword Parameter, dword ParameterValue )
description: Sets an optional parameter using a DWORD value after creating a message.

parameters.name: Parameter
parameters.description: ID number of the parameter, as denoted in the lists of optional parameters below each Create-function
